aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO with clear service offerings and contact information but lacks customer reviews and detailed content to build authority.
quick_wins: Encourage satisfied customers to leave Google reviews to build social proof and improve local search visibility.
Expand service pages with detailed content, FAQs, and targeted keywords to enhance relevance for search engines.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has location-specific content (Boston, MA) and a phone number but lacks a Google Business Profile (GBP).
gbp_analysis.summary: The absence of a GBP significantly impacts local search visibility and customer engagement opportunities.
critical_issues: No Google Business Profile (GBP) set up.
Missing location-specific landing pages or content optimizations.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) on its website but lacks citations on external platforms.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Apple Maps.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms, including social media profiles.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and detailed content to establish authority and relevance.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services with local intent due to the absence of a GBP and local citations.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Setting up a Google Business Profile and generating initial customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating comprehensive, keyword-rich content for service pages and publishing customer testimonials.

page_title: Home HVAC Contractor in Boston, MA - Service Right, LLC
